data.content: Implemented another settings visual pass with stronger purple/green treatment in row-level controls and forms across agents/actions/pools/defaults. Increased gradients, borders, rings, and hover states while preserving behavior. Quality gates: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (1946 passed), NODE_ENV=production bun run build (success). Feature commit f9606a7 integrated to main as 1f56647 and pushed to origin/main.
